title: Add Wycheproof ECDH P-521 test vectors
description: wycheproof_ecdh.rs has runners for P-256 and P-384 but not P-521. The P521EcdhSecret type is exported and ecdh_secp521r1_ecpoint_test.json exists in the Wycheproof submodule. The absence is conspicuous: P-521 was added in this EVP-removal work but has no Wycheproof known-vector coverage for ECDH. Fix: add a wycheproof_ecdh_p521 test group to wycheproof_ecdh.rs following the same pattern as the P-256 and P-384 runners, gated on wolfssl_ecc_p521.
